channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: A 35% XRP Price Swing? The Massive Symmetrical Triangle Forming on Ripple’s Chart
item.description: While XRP's price has been making lower lows, its RSI has been making higher lows, meaning selling pressure is fading....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: DeFi users pull $10 billion out of the market as $292 million exploit sparks bank-run optics
item.description: A $292 million exploit at KelpDAO set off a broad retreat across decentralized finance over the weekend, draining roughly $10 billion across the DeFi industry and forcing multiple protocols to freeze ...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide, oil jumps on renewed U.S.-Iran war risks
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $74,335 after Iran reimposed controls on the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, with the modest 1.6% pullback standing out against a 5.7% jump in Brent and a 1.2% drop in European eq...
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: LayerZero blames Kelp's setup for $290 million exploit, attributes it to North Korea's Lazarus
item.description: LayerZero said the attackers compromised two RPC nodes the company's verifier relied on and DDoS'd the rest, with the attack working only because Kelp had ignored multi-verifier recommendations....

item.description: Breach tied to compromised AI tool may have exposed credentials used by app frontends, the user-facing layer that connects web3 wallets and trading interfaces to backend services....

item.title: Man gets 30 months for selling thousands of hacked DraftKings accounts
item.description: 23-year-old Kamerin Stokes of Memphis, Tennessee, was sentenced to 30 months in prison for selling access to tens of thousands of hacked DraftKings accounts. [...]...

item.title: Recently leaked Windows zero-days now exploited in attacks

item.title: Apache ActiveMQ CVE-2026-34197 Added to CISA KEV Amid Active Exploitation
item.description: A recently disclosed high-severity security flaw in Apache ActiveMQ Classic has come under active exploitation in the wild, per the U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). To tha...

item.title: Operation PowerOFF identifies 75k DDoS users, takes down 53 domains

item.title: 'Harmless' Global Adware Transforms Into an AV Killer
item.description: A benign looking update Dragon Boss pushed out in March 2025 established persistence via scheduled tasks and arranged for future payloads to be excluded from Windows Defender....

item.title: Newly Discovered PowMix Botnet Hits Czech Workers Using Randomized C2 Traffic

item.title: Two-Factor Authentication Breaks Free from the Desktop
item.description: Threat actors know how to bypass security systems outside of traditional IT environments. Implementing 2FA could provide a needed extra security barrier in the physical world....

item.title: Microsoft's Original Windows Secure Boot Certificate Is Expiring
